name: Iso11783GetAddress
title: Iso11783GetAddress
syntax: dword Iso11783GetAddress( char[] busName, dword componentMask, char deviceName[8] );
description: This function returns a network address with which a device that is described by the function parameters logged onto the network.
return: Address of the node or Null Address (0xFE) if no device is found or FFFFFFFFh if the functions fails.
